data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for specific task types: upload document, watch video, purchase item, confirm understanding. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm these task types are covered. The absence of such evidence indicates a gap in the implementation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or state checks for the task types: upload document, watch video, purchase item, confirm understanding.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
